highlights: Trace POP, Triangulate POP, Alembic Out POP, File Out POP, Point File In POP
DMX Fixture POP, DMX Out POP, DMX Map DAT, Pan Tilt CHOP — full lighting/DMX workflow
Layer Mix TOP — unlimited image layer compositing
Render Simple TOP — render geometry without scene COMPs
NVIDIA RTX Video TOP — AI super-resolution + HDR
ST2110 In/Out TOP and ST2110 Device CHOP — pro media-over-IP
Most TOPs now natively support 3D textures and 2D arrays
Pattern matching unified across operators (& | ~ set notation, [start-end:step:take])
Color management overhaul — sRGB/ACEScg/DCI-P3/Rec.2020/ACES2065-1, HDR window pixel formats
Laser CHOP overhauled — corner vs guide points, per-corner attributes
Movie File Out TOP — VVC, AV1, AAC/Opus, stereo/spherical metadata
Movie/Audio File Out — Exif/ID3 metadata; Media File Info DAT can read it
ZED 5.0.2 (Blackwell support), Orbbec macOS Intel, IDS Peak with PTP, Bluefish 10-bit + HDMI timecode

changed_ops.change: Render Pulse, Background Color, UV Unwrap POP support, native 3D-texture/2D-array output
Negative index seek, pre-download toggle, .ktx (KTX2) format support
VVC codec, AV1, AAC/Opus audio, stereo/spherical metadata, Exif export
Simplex/Perlin 4D with derivatives + gradient output
Can directly generate 3D textures and 2D arrays
Justify Horizontal/Vertical params
Reverse row/column order, max/exact sizing modes
Unlimited blobs on Non-Commercial licenses
Simulation mode with absorption/transmission
Countdown mode
Count Up/Down pulses, multi-channel increment support
Snap parameter for threshold-based snapping
Reset toggle and pulse parameters
Release and Reset pulse parameters
Overhauled — corner vs guide points, per-corner LasCornerHoldAdd/LookupFactor, direct POP input
Delayed loading, playback controls
Now 3D-only input (use Trace POP for 2D); width fixed to 1, height/depth vary with aspect
Text scaling and padding controls
Face Camera, depth scaling, FOV independence
Colored emoji glyphs, placeholder text, drop shadows
Output color space, prevent display sleep
Timecode over HDMI, manual capture, presets

new_python_members.note: Text summary if defined by operator
Single-point reads with optional non-blocking GPU/CPU mode

migration_warnings: Polygonize POP is now 3D-only — switch 2D inputs to Trace POP
ZED operators now reference a ZED TOP — workflow restructure required
Web Render TOP cannot share cache between two instances
Layer Mix TOP resolution calculation differs from older Composite TOP setups — verify dependent networks
HDR window pixel formats may show alpha-blending issues on network-editor backdrop TOPs
Pattern matching: bracket index syntax `[0-10:2]` and set notation `&|~` is now standard — older `*` patterns still work but new code should use brackets
Color management defaults moved to Preferences > Color tab — confirm working color space matches project intent
Build is officially named '2025.30000 series' (Jan 2026 onward); older 2023.xxxxx projects open fine but TOPs may behave differently due to color/texture upgrades
